LanguageData.UB_SNS_propaganda.title: Failed propaganda artist
LanguageData.UB_SNS_propaganda.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was one of the many citizens who tried to win their government's propaganda poster competition. [PAWN_pronoun] spent months trying to come up with an original idea, but was only able to come up with a picture of grass, with Comic Sans text that read 'Love big Government'. [PAWN_nameDef] not only didn't win the competition, but [PAWN_possessive] poster was shown and publicly shamed, leading to [PAWN_objective] being socially outcasted by many.
